translations.Starter overview with sample KPIs and ac: Starter overview with sample KPIs and activity placeholders. Replace this view with your own data.
translations.Wire buttons here to create records, ope: Wire buttons here to create records, open lists, or deep links. Use the sidebar for Settings and Documentation.
translations.This app needs OpenRegister to store and: This app needs OpenRegister to store and manage data. Please install OpenRegister from the app store to get started.
translations.User settings will appear here in a futu: User settings will appear here in a future update.

translations.Your responses have been recorded. Auto-: Your responses have been recorded. Auto-scored items are marked immediately. Essay items will be reviewed by your teacher.
translations.This assessment is configured with proct: This assessment is configured with proctoring (provider: {provider}). No proctoring adapter is installed — the assessment will proceed without live proctoring. Contact your administrator.

translations.Essay items have no automatic correct re: Essay items have no automatic correct response — teachers score these manually. This item will require manual scoring before the AssessmentResult can be graded.

translations.Review flagged proctoring events. Decisi: Review flagged proctoring events. Decisions are recorded for compliance; no result is altered automatically (EU AI Act Art. 14).

translations.Annulling a flag does not automatically: Annulling a flag does not automatically invalidate the result. Use the AssessmentResult view to take further action.
